loyalty_program.label: Loyalty Program
loyalty_program.description: Offer loyalty rewards, referral bonuses, and exclusive member benefits

discount_offer.label: Discount Offer
discount_offer.description: Offer service discounts, bundle deals, or promotional pricing

retention_call.label: Retention Call
retention_call.description: Direct outreach with personalized retention offer tailored to customer

vip_support.label: VIP Support
vip_support.description: Upgrade to premium support with dedicated account manager and priority service

early_exit_waiver.label: Early Exit Waiver
early_exit_waiver.description: Waive early termination fees to reduce friction if customer still decides to leave

comments.priority_weights: Weights must sum to 1.0. Adjust to reflect business priorities.
comments.segment_risk_scores: 0=lowest risk, 1=highest risk. Used to compute priority scores.
comments.thresholds: Base thresholds for value classification and churn risk categorization.
comments.segment_specific_actions: Optional: segment-specific action overrides based on churn risk level.
